Wei [unknown] (Wenjing) 衛? (文經)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei [unknown] (衛?), styledWenjing (文經), was born in Jing province?. Noted by Chen Shou that no name, achievements or place of origin were available. Wei [unknown] was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
